title: Pride Ghast
description: Changes the Ghast Harnesses into Pride Flags.
body:
Changes the ghast harness colors into LGBTQ+ pride flags

- White		-     Ally 		
- Light Gray	-     Agender	
- Grey		-     Asexual		
- Black		-     NonBinary		
- Brown		-     Pride		
- Red         -     Lesbian		
- Orange	    -     AroAce
- Yellow		-     Intersex
- Lime		-     Aromantic
- Green		-     GenderQueer
- Cyan		-     Gay	
- Light Blue	-     Pansexual
- Blue		-     Polysexual
- Purple		-     GenderFluid	
- Magenta	    -     Bisexual
- Pink		-     Transexual
